heroTextSection.label: CULINARY EXCELLENCE
heroTextSection.title: The Heart of the Home
heroTextSection.description: A Cherfan kitchen is a curated gallery of stone and wood, designed to be the centerpiece of the modern home. We blend precise international engineering with rich, organic textures to create a functional masterpiece that defines your living space. By focusing on the quiet luxury of timeless materials, we transform the heart of your home into an architectural statement that is as durable as it is beautiful.
heroTextSection.description1: Every detail is a careful balance of strength and warmth, crafted to be the lasting foundation where your family’s stories begin. We believe that great design should simplify your life while elevating your daily rituals. From the first morning light on the marble to the evening glow on the timber, these kitchens are built to offer a sensory experience that stays with you for generations.

image1.label: A
image1.title: Elevated Ceramic
image1.description: Built for strength, refined for living.

textSection.label: ARCHITECTURAL LIVING
textSection.title: A Space for Ritual
textSection.description: Minimalist in form, yet infinite in feeling. Design that doesn't just fill a room, but defines how you live within it. We use stone and light to build spaces that transcend trends. Every layout is a study in proportion, curated to bring order, beauty, and a sense of permanence to your life.

projects.title: Marai A12
projects.description: A kitchen island where rich walnut wood wrap around sculpted black onyx ceramic, creating a dialogue between warmth and depth.

projects.title: Ligno Z23
projects.description:
A kitchen where warm minimalism meets refined living.
Soft ceramic surfaces and muted tones create a calm, timeless space designed for effortless elegance.

projects.title: Layera AM1
projects.description: Glossy cabinets combined with walnut wood tones create a modern, clean kitchen, while adding warmth and contrast to the space.

projects.title: Mirai C2
projects.description: Wrapped in the soft stillness of Moon Grey ceramic, this kitchen evokes the quiet beauty of twilight. Subtle, grounded, and endlessly refined.

projects.title: Troy B4
projects.description:
A kitchen defined by the beauty of onyx-inspired ceramic.
Translucent tones and organic veining flow across the island and backsplash, transforming ceramic into a statement of natural depth and modern luxury.

projects.title: Cimi 01
projects.description:
Soft grey tones meet clever design — crafted for both experience and practicality.
Ceramic surfaces bring durability and quiet elegance, while warm lighting and layered storage create a kitchen that feels as functional as it is refined.

projects.title: Taloy D5
projects.description: Where warmth meets modern edge — walnut textures, glossy whites, and sleek greys in perfect harmony. A refined ceramic countertop anchors the space, bringing durability, elegance, and a calm architectural presence to everyday living.

projects.title: Glory C6
projects.description: Bespoke kitchen featuring custom details and premium materials. This carefully crafted space reflects your unique personality while maintaining the highest standards of excellence.

finalTextSection.label: Serge Cherfan
finalTextSection.title: Creative Designer
finalTextSection.description1:
A multidisciplinary creative whose work spans interior architecture, furniture design, and fine art, now driving the vision behind Cherfan Design Kitchens.

Approaching each project with the mindset of an artist, Serge brings a deep appreciation for craftsmanship and detail into every space he creates. His design language is defined by clean lines, a refined palette, and an uncompromising pursuit of perfection.
finalTextSection.description2: By harmonizing modern aesthetics with timeless sensibilities, Serge crafts environments that feel both contemporary and enduring — kitchens designed not only to function beautifully, but to inspire everyday living.
